message.content:
In /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/buk/buv_validation.sh, transform 1 instance:

- Line 22: `test -n "${ZBUV_INCLUDED:-}" && return 0` → `test -z "${ZBUV_INCLUDED:-}" || return 0`

Read the file first, then make the edit. Do not change anything else.

content.content:
1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     3→#
     4→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     5→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     6→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     7→#
     8→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
     9→#
    10→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    11→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    12→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    13→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    14→# limitations under the License.
    15→#
    16→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    17→#
    18→# Bash Validation Utility Library
    19→# Compatible with Bash 3.2 (e.g., macOS default shell)
    20→
    21→# Multiple inclusion guard
    22→test -n "${ZBUV_INCLUDED:-}" && return 0
    23→ZBUV_INCLUDED=1
    24→
    25→# Literal constants — check capture output protocol markers
    26→BUV_check_gated="gated"
    27→BUV_check_fail="fail:"
    28→
    29→# Source the console utility library
    30→ZBUV_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    31→source "${ZBUV_SCRIPT_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
    32→
    33→buv_file_exists() {
    34→  local z_filepath="${1:-}"
    35→  test -f "${z_filepath}" || buc_die "Required file not found: ${z_filepath}"
    36→}
    37→
    38→buv_dir_exists() {
    39→  local z_dirpath="${1:-}"
    40→  test -d "${z_dirpath}" || buc_die "Required directory not found: ${z_dirpath}"
    41→}
    42→
    43→buv_dir_empty() {
    44→  local z_dirpath="${1:-}"
    45→  test -d "${z_dirpath}" || buc_die "Required directory not found: ${z_dirpath}"
    46→  local z_check_file
    47→  z_check_file=$(mktemp)
    48→  find "${z_dirpath}" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -print -quit > "${z_check_file}"
    49→  test ! -s "${z_check_file}" || { rm -f "${z_check_file}"; buc_die "Directory must be empty: ${z_dirpath}"; }
    50→  rm -f "${z_check_file}"
    51→}
    52→
    53→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    54→# Enrollment infrastructure
    55→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56→
    57→zbuv_kindle() {
    58→  test -z "${ZBUV_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module buv already kindled"
    59→
    60→  # Enrollment rolls (9 parallel arrays)
    61→  z_buv_scope_roll=()
    62→  z_buv_varname_roll=()
    63→  z_buv_type_roll=()
    64→  z_buv_gate_var_roll=()
    65→  z_buv_gate_val_roll=()
    66→  z_buv_p1_roll=()
    67→  z_buv_p2_roll=()
    68→  z_buv_group_roll=()
    69→  z_buv_desc_roll=()
    70→
    71→  # Group registry rolls (4 parallel arrays, foreign-keyed by group title)
    72→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll=()
    73→  z_buv_grp_title_roll=()
    74→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll=()
    75→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll=()
    76→
    77→  # Mutable kindle state: regime context (set by buv_regime_enroll / buv_group_enroll / buv_gate_enroll)
    78→  z_buv_current_scope=""
    79→  z_buv_current_group=""
    80→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
    81→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
    82→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
    83→
    84→  readonly ZBUV_KINDLED=1
    85→}
    86→
    87→zbuv_sentinel() {
    88→  test "${ZBUV_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module buv not kindled - call zbuv_kindle first"
    89→}
    90→
    91→# Test support: reset enrollment state without re-kindling
    92→zbuv_reset_enrollment() {
    93→  zbuv_sentinel
    94→
    95→  # Clear enrollment rolls
    96→  z_buv_scope_roll=()
    97→  z_buv_varname_roll=()
    98→  z_buv_type_roll=()
    99→  z_buv_gate_var_roll=()
   100→  z_buv_gate_val_roll=()
   101→  z_buv_p1_roll=()
   102→  z_buv_p2_roll=()
   103→  z_buv_group_roll=()
   104→  z_buv_desc_roll=()
   105→
   106→  # Clear group registry rolls
   107→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll=()
   108→  z_buv_grp_title_roll=()
   109→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll=()
   110→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll=()
   111→
   112→  # Reset regime context state
   113→  z_buv_current_scope=""
   114→  z_buv_current_group=""
   115→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
   116→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   117→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   118→}
   119→
   120→# Regime context setters — called during kindle to establish enrollment scope
   121→
   122→# buv_regime_enroll SCOPE — set current enrollment scope
   123→# Validates that SCOPE is non-empty. All subsequent enroll calls use this scope
   124→# until another buv_regime_enroll is called.
   125→buv_regime_enroll() {
   126→  zbuv_sentinel
   127→
   128→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   129→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_regime_enroll: scope required"
   130→  z_buv_current_scope="${z_scope}"
   131→  z_buv_current_group=""
   132→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
   133→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   134→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   135→}
   136→
   137→# buv_group_enroll TITLE — set current group context
   138→# Creates a group registry entry. All subsequent enroll calls are tagged with
   139→# this group title until the next buv_group_enroll call.
   140→# Resets gate context — use buv_gate_enroll after this to gate items.
   141→buv_group_enroll() {
   142→  zbuv_sentinel
   143→
   144→  test -n "${z_buv_current_scope}" || buc_die "buv_group_enroll: call buv_regime_enroll first"
   145→
   146→  local z_title="${1:-}"
   147→  test -n "${z_title}" || buc_die "buv_group_enroll: title required"
   148→
   149→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll+=("${z_buv_current_scope}")
   150→  z_buv_grp_title_roll+=("${z_title}")
   151→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll+=("")
   152→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll+=("")
   153→
   154→  z_buv_current_group="${z_title}"
   155→  z_buv_current_group_idx=$(( ${#z_buv_grp_scope_roll[@]} - 1 ))
   156→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   157→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   158→}
   159→
   160→# buv_gate_enroll GATE_VAR GATE_VAL — set gate context within current group
   161→# All subsequent variable enrolls in this group are gated by this condition.
   162→# Also registers the gate on the current group for render section headers.
   163→buv_gate_enroll() {
   164→  zbuv_sentinel
   165→
   166→  test -n "${z_buv_current_group}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: call buv_group_enroll first"
   167→
   168→  local z_gate_var="${1:-}"
   169→  local z_gate_val="${2:-}"
   170→  test -n "${z_gate_var}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: gate variable required"
   171→  test -n "${z_gate_val}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: gate value required"
   172→
   173→  z_buv_current_gate_var="${z_gate_var}"
   174→  z_buv_current_gate_val="${z_gate_val}"
   175→
   176→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll[$z_buv_current_group_idx]="${z_gate_var}"
   177→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll[$z_buv_current_group_idx]="${z_gate_val}"
   178→}
   179→
   180→# Internal enrollment helper — all public enroll functions delegate here
   181→# Usage: zbuv_enroll VARNAME TYPE P1 P2 DESC
   182→# Gate context inherited from buv_gate_enroll; group from buv_group_enroll.
   183→zbuv_enroll() {
   184→  zbuv_sentinel
   185→
   186→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   187→  local z_type="${2:-}"
   188→  local z_p1="${3:-}"
   189→  local z_p2="${4:-}"
   190→  local z_desc="${5:-}"
   191→
   192→  test -n "${z_buv_current_scope}" || buc_die "zbuv_enroll: call buv_regime_enroll first"
   193→  echo "${z_varname}" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$' || buc_die "zbuv_enroll: invalid variable name: '${z_varname}'"
   194→
   195→  z_buv_scope_roll+=("${z_buv_current_scope}")
   196→  z_buv_varname_roll+=("${z_varname}")
   197→  z_buv_type_roll+=("${z_type}")
   198→  z_buv_gate_var_roll+=("${z_buv_current_gate_var}")
   199→  z_buv_gate_val_roll+=("${z_buv_current_gate_val}")
   200→  z_buv_p1_roll+=("${z_p1}")
   201→  z_buv_p2_roll+=("${z_p2}")
   202→  z_buv_group_roll+=("${z_buv_current_group}")
   203→  z_buv_desc_roll+=("${z_desc}")
   204→}
   205→
   206→# Public enrollment functions — scalar types
   207→#
   208→# Signature: buv_TYPE_enroll VARNAME P1 P2 "description"
   209→# Scope from buv_regime_enroll; group from buv_group_enroll; gate from buv_gate_enroll.
   210→
   211→buv_string_enroll() {
   212→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   213→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   214→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   215→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   216→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "string" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   217→}
   218→
   219→buv_xname_enroll() {
   220→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   221→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   222→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   223→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   224→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "xname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   225→}
   226→
   227→buv_gname_enroll() {
   228→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   229→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   230→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   231→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   232→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "gname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   233→}
   234→
   235→buv_fqin_enroll() {
   236→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   237→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   238→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   239→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   240→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "fqin" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   241→}
   242→
   243→buv_bool_enroll() {
   244→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   245→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   246→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "bool" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   247→}
   248→
   249→buv_enum_enroll() {
   250→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   251→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   252→  shift 2
   253→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "enum" "$*" "" "${z_desc}"
   254→}
   255→
   256→buv_decimal_enroll() {
   257→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   258→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   259→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   260→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   261→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "decimal" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   262→}
   263→
   264→buv_odref_enroll() {
   265→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   266→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   267→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "odref" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   268→}
   269→
   270→buv_ipv4_enroll() {
   271→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   272→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   273→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "ipv4" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   274→}
   275→
   276→buv_port_enroll() {
   277→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   278→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   279→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "port" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   280→}
   281→
   282→# Public enrollment functions — list types
   283→
   284→buv_list_string_enroll() {
   285→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   286→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   287→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   288→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   289→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_string" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   290→}
   291→
   292→buv_list_ipv4_enroll() {
   293→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   294→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   295→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_ipv4" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   296→}
   297→
   298→buv_list_gname_enroll() {
   299→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   300→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   301→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   302→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   303→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_gname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   304→}
   305→
   306→buv_list_cidr_enroll() {
   307→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   308→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   309→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_cidr" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   310→}
   311→
   312→buv_list_domain_enroll() {
   313→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   314→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   315→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_domain" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   316→}
   317→
   318→# Internal check capture — validates a single enrolled variable by roll index.
   319→# Returns error detail on stdout (empty = pass).
   320→# Echo "${BUV_check_gated}" when gate doesn't match (caller decides skip behavior).
   321→# Echo "${BUV_check_fail}<detail>" on validation failure.
   322→zbuv_check_capture() {
   323→  zbuv_sentinel
   324→
   325→  local z_idx="${1:-}"
   326→  local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_idx]}"
   327→  local z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_idx]}"
   328→  local z_gate_var="${z_buv_gate_var_roll[$z_idx]}"
   329→  local z_gate_val="${z_buv_gate_val_roll[$z_idx]}"
   330→  local z_p1="${z_buv_p1_roll[$z_idx]}"
   331→  local z_p2="${z_buv_p2_roll[$z_idx]}"
   332→
   333→  # Gating check — if gated and gate doesn't match, skip (pass)
   334→  if test -n "${z_gate_var}"; then
   335→    local z_gate_actual="${!z_gate_var:-}"
   336→    if test "${z_gate_actual}" != "${z_gate_val}"; then
   337→      echo "${BUV_check_gated}"
   338→      return 0
   339→    fi
   340→  fi
   341→
   342→  # Unset detection — distinguish "not set" from "set but empty"
   343→  if test -z "${!z_varname+x}"; then
   344→    case "${z_type}" in
   345→      string|gname)
   346→        if test "${z_p1}" = "0"; then return 0; fi ;;
   347→      list_string|list_ipv4|list_gname|list_cidr|list_domain)
   348→        return 0 ;;
   349→    esac
   350→    echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} is not set (missing from .env?)"
   351→    return 0
   352→  fi
   353→
   354→  local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   355→
   356→  case "${z_type}" in
   357→
   358→    string)
   359→      if test "${z_p1}" = "0" && test -z "${z_val}"; then
   360→        return 0
   361→      fi
   362→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   363→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   364→        return 0
   365→      fi
   366→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   367→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   368→        return 0
   369→      fi
   370→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   371→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   372→        return 0
   373→      fi
   374→      ;;
   375→
   376→    xname)
   377→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   378→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   379→        return 0
   380→      fi
   381→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   382→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   383→        return 0
   384→      fi
   385→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   386→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   387→        return 0
   388→      fi
   389→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$' || {
   390→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '${z_val}'"
   391→        return 0
   392→      }
   393→      ;;
   394→
   395→    gname)
   396→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   397→        if test "${z_p1}" -gt 0; then
   398→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   399→          return 0
   400→        fi
   401→        return 0
   402→      fi
   403→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   404→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   405→        return 0
   406→      fi
   407→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   408→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   409→        return 0
   410→      fi
   411→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$' || {
   412→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$ (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; start with a letter; end with letter/digit), got '${z_val}'"
   413→        return 0
   414→      }
   415→      ;;
   416→
   417→    fqin)
   418→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   419→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   420→        return 0
   421→      fi
   422→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   423→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   424→        return 0
   425→      fi
   426→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   427→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   428→        return 0
   429→      fi
   430→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9:._/-]*$' || {
   431→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must start with letter/number and contain only letters, numbers, colons, dots, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, got '${z_val}'"
   432→        return 0
   433→      }
   434→      ;;
   435→
   436→    bool)
   437→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   438→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   439→        return 0
   440→      fi
   441→      if test "${z_val}" != "0" && test "${z_val}" != "1"; then
   442→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be 0 or 1, got: '${z_val}'"
   443→        return 0
   444→      fi
   445→      ;;
   446→
   447→    enum)
   448→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   449→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   450→        return 0
   451→      fi
   452→      local z_choice
   453→      local z_found=0
   454→      for z_choice in ${z_p1}; do
   455→        if test "${z_val}" = "${z_choice}"; then
   456→          z_found=1
   457→          break
   458→        fi
   459→      done
   460→      if test "${z_found}" = "0"; then
   461→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be one of: ${z_p1}, got '${z_val}'"
   462→        return 0
   463→      fi
   464→      ;;
   465→
   466→    decimal)
   467→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   468→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   469→        return 0
   470→      fi
   471→      if test "${z_val}" -ge "${z_p1}" && test "${z_val}" -le "${z_p2}"; then
   472→        return 0
   473→      fi
   474→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} value '${z_val}' must be between ${z_p1} and ${z_p2}"
   475→      return 0
   476→      ;;
   477→
   478→    odref)
   479→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   480→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   481→        return 0
   482→      fi
   483→      local z_re='^[a-z0-9.-]+(:[0-9]{2,5})?/([a-z0-9._-]+/)*[a-z0-9._-]+@sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$'
   484→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -Eq "${z_re}" || {
   485→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} has invalid image reference format (require host[:port]/repo@sha256:<64hex>), got '${z_val}'"
   486→        return 0
   487→      }
   488→      ;;
   489→
   490→    ipv4)
   491→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   492→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   493→        return 0
   494→      fi
   495→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$' || {
   496→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} has invalid IPv4 format: '${z_val}'"
   497→        return 0
   498→      }
   499→      ;;
   500→
   501→    port)
   502→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   503→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   504→        return 0
   505→      fi
   506→      if test "${z_val}" -ge 1 && test "${z_val}" -le 65535; then
   507→        return 0
   508→      fi
   509→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} value '${z_val}' must be between 1 and 65535"
   510→      return 0
   511→      ;;
   512→
   513→    list_string)
   514→      local z_item
   515→      local z_item_num=0
   516→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   517→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   518→        if test "${#z_item}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   519→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   520→          return 0
   521→        fi
   522→        if test "${#z_item}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   523→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   524→          return 0
   525→        fi
   526→      done
   527→      ;;
   528→
   529→    list_ipv4)
   530→      local z_item
   531→      local z_item_num=0
   532→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   533→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   534→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$' || {
   535→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid IPv4 format: '${z_item}'"
   536→          return 0
   537→        }
   538→      done
   539→      ;;
   540→
   541→    list_gname)
   542→      local z_item
   543→      local z_item_num=0
   544→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   545→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   546→        if test "${#z_item}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   547→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   548→          return 0
   549→        fi
   550→        if test "${#z_item}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   551→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   552→          return 0
   553→        fi
   554→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$' || {
   555→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$, got '${z_item}'"
   556→          return 0
   557→        }
   558→      done
   559→      ;;
   560→
   561→    list_cidr)
   562→      local z_item
   563→      local z_item_num=0
   564→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   565→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   566→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$' || {
   567→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid CIDR format: '${z_item}'"
   568→          return 0
   569→        }
   570→      done
   571→      ;;
   572→
   573→    list_domain)
   574→      local z_item
   575→      local z_item_num=0
   576→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   577→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   578→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$' || {
   579→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid domain format: '${z_item}'"
   580→          return 0
   581→        }
   582→      done
   583→      ;;
   584→
   585→    *)
   586→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}unknown type: ${z_type}"
   587→      return 0
   588→      ;;
   589→
   590→  esac
   591→}
   592→
   593→# buv_scope_sentinel SCOPE PREFIX — die if any PREFIX_ vars exist that are not enrolled in SCOPE
   594→# Usage: buv_scope_sentinel RBRN RBRN_
   595→buv_scope_sentinel() {
   596→  zbuv_sentinel
   597→
   598→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   599→  local z_prefix="${2:-}"
   600→  test -n "${z_scope}"  || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: scope required"
   601→  test -n "${z_prefix}" || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: prefix required"
   602→
   603→  # Build lookup string from enrolled varnames for this scope
   604→  local z_known=" "
   605→  local z_i
   606→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   607→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   608→    z_known="${z_known}${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]} "
   609→  done
   610→
   611→  # Scan environment for unexpected vars with this prefix
   612→  local z_unexpected=()
   613→  local z_var
   614→  for z_var in $(compgen -v "${z_prefix}"); do
   615→    case "${z_known}" in
   616→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
   617→      *) z_unexpected+=("${z_var}") ;;
   618→    esac
   619→  done
   620→
   621→  if test "${#z_unexpected[@]}" -gt 0; then
   622→    buc_die "Unexpected ${z_prefix}* variables not enrolled in ${z_scope}: ${z_unexpected[*]}"
   623→  fi
   624→}
   625→
   626→# buv_docker_env SCOPE ARRAY_VAR — populate ARRAY_VAR with -e VARNAME=val pairs for all enrolled vars in SCOPE
   627→# Usage: buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
   628→buv_docker_env() {
   629→  zbuv_sentinel
   630→
   631→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   632→  local z_array_var="${2:-}"
   633→  test -n "${z_scope}"     || buc_die "buv_docker_env: scope required"
   634→  test -n "${z_array_var}" || buc_die "buv_docker_env: array variable name required"
   635→
   636→  eval "${z_array_var}=()"
   637→
   638→  local z_i
   639→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   640→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   641→    local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   642→    local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   643→    eval "${z_array_var}+=(\"-e\" \"${z_varname}=${z_val}\")"
   644→  done
   645→}
   646→
   647→# buv_vet SCOPE — iterate all enrolled vars in scope; die on first failure
   648→buv_vet() {
   649→  zbuv_sentinel
   650→
   651→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   652→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_vet: scope required"
   653→
   654→  local z_i
   655→  local z_err
   656→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   657→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   658→    z_err=$(zbuv_check_capture "${z_i}")
   659→    test -z "${z_err}" || test "${z_err}" = "${BUV_check_gated}" || buc_die "${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}: ${z_err#"${BUV_check_fail}"}"
   660→  done
   661→}
   662→
   663→# buv_lock SCOPE — make all enrolled variables in scope readonly
   664→# Call after enforce succeeds. Prevents downstream mutation of validated config.
   665→buv_lock() {
   666→  zbuv_sentinel
   667→
   668→  local -r z_scope="${1:-}"
   669→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_lock: scope required"
   670→
   671→  local z_i
   672→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   673→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   674→    readonly "${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   675→  done
   676→}
   677→
   678→# buv_report SCOPE "Label" — rich per-variable display; returns non-zero if any failed
   679→buv_report() {
   680→  zbuv_sentinel
   681→
   682→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   683→  local z_label="${2:-}"
   684→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_report: scope required"
   685→  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "buv_report: label required"
   686→
   687→  local z_any_failed=0
   688→
   689→  buc_step "${z_label}"
   690→
   691→  local z_i
   692→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   693→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   694→
   695→    local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   696→    local z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_i]}"
   697→    local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   698→    local z_err
   699→
   700→    z_err=$(zbuv_check_capture "${z_i}")
   701→    if test -z "${z_err}"; then
   702→      buc_step "  PASS  ${z_varname}=${z_val} [${z_type}]"
   703→    elif test "${z_err}" = "${BUV_check_gated}"; then
   704→      buc_step "  SKIP  ${z_varname} (gated)"
   705→    else
   706→      buc_step "  FAIL  ${z_varname}=${z_val} [${z_type}]: ${z_err#"${BUV_check_fail}"}"
   707→      z_any_failed=1
   708→    fi
   709→  done
   710→
   711→  return "${z_any_failed}"
   712→}
   713→
   714→# zbuv_group_gate_recite SCOPE TITLE — look up group gate from registry
   715→# Sets ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR and ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL (empty if ungated).
   716→zbuv_group_gate_recite() {
   717→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   718→  local z_title="${2:-}"
   719→
   720→  ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR=""
   721→  ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL=""
   722→
   723→  local z_s
   724→  for z_s in "${!z_buv_grp_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   725→    if test "${z_buv_grp_scope_roll[$z_s]}" = "${z_scope}" \
   726→      && test "${z_buv_grp_title_roll[$z_s]}" = "${z_title}"; then
   727→      ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR="${z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll[$z_s]}"
   728→      ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL="${z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll[$z_s]}"
   729→      return 0
   730→    fi
   731→  done
   732→}
   733→
   734→# zbuv_req_status INDEX — derive req/opt/cond from enrollment data
   735→# Sets ZBUV_REQ_STATUS.
   736→zbuv_req_status() {
   737→  local z_idx="${1:-}"
   738→  local z_gate_var="${z_buv_gate_var_roll[$z_idx]}"
   739→  local z_p1="${z_buv_p1_roll[$z_idx]}"
   740→
   741→  if test -n "${z_gate_var}"; then
   742→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="cond"
   743→  elif test "${z_p1}" = "0"; then
   744→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="opt"
   745→  else
   746→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="req"
   747→  fi
   748→}
   749→
   750→# buv_render SCOPE "Label" — render all enrolled vars via bupr_ presentation
   751→# Walks enrollment rolls grouped by group, applying group-level gates.
   752→# Requires bupr (PresentationRegime) to be kindled.
   753→buv_render() {
   754→  zbuv_sentinel
   755→  zbupr_sentinel
   756→
   757→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   758→  local z_label="${2:-}"
   759→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_render: scope required"
   760→  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "buv_render: label required"
   761→
   762→  local z_current_group=""
   763→  local z_i
   764→  local z_group=""
   765→  local z_varname=""
   766→  local z_type=""
   767→  local z_desc=""
   768→
   769→  echo ""
   770→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}${z_label}${ZBUC_RESET}"
   771→  echo ""
   772→
   773→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   774→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   775→
   776→    z_group="${z_buv_group_roll[$z_i]}"
   777→    z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   778→    z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_i]}"
   779→    z_desc="${z_buv_desc_roll[$z_i]}"
   780→
   781→    # Group transition — close previous, open new
   782→    if test "${z_group}" != "${z_current_group}"; then
   783→      if test -n "${z_current_group}"; then
   784→        bupr_section_end
   785→      fi
   786→      z_current_group="${z_group}"
   787→
   788→      zbuv_group_gate_recite "${z_scope}" "${z_group}"
   789→      if test -n "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR}"; then
   790→        bupr_section_begin "${z_group}" "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR}" "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL}"
   791→      else
   792→        bupr_section_begin "${z_group}"
   793→      fi
   794→    fi
   795→
   796→    zbuv_req_status "${z_i}"
   797→    bupr_section_item "${z_varname}" "${z_type}" "${ZBUV_REQ_STATUS}" "${z_desc}"
   798→  done
   799→
   800→  # Close final group
   801→  if test -n "${z_current_group}"; then
   802→    bupr_section_end
   803→  fi
   804→}
   805→
   806→# eof
   807→
